chunks.text: Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2020 - EECS at Berkeley Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2020 This day-long symposium will highlight the latest research in the EECS department and will feature a slate of informative talks by distinguished EECS faculty members and directors of some of our world-renowned centers and labs . Thursday, February 13, 2020 9 am – 3:30 pm Chevron Auditorium International House 2299 Piedmont Ave. Berkeley, CA 94720 Parking and Transportation < BEARS 2020 Parking & Transportation BEARS 2020 Registration > Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2020 BEARS 2020 Registration BEARS 2020 Speakers BEARS 2020 Centers and Labs BEARS 2020 Schedule BEARS 2020 Parking & Transportation Current BEARS BEARS Archive EECS Research View Open Faculty Positions
